_meta.description: Auto-generated silver evaluation set for NHS Shetland Annual Report 2015/16. Answers produced by the pipeline (retrieval + Ollama generation) and filtered to generation_confidence=1.0. NOT human-verified.

queries.question: What was the total net expenditure for NHS Shetland in 2015/16?
What was the Core Revenue Resource Limit for NHS Shetland in 2015/16?
queries.expected_answer: The Core Revenue Resource Limit for NHS Shetland in 2015/16 was £53,206k.

queries.question: What was the Capital Resource Limit for NHS Shetland in 2015/16?
queries.expected_answer: The Capital Resource Limit for NHS Shetland in 2015/16 was £362,287,000.

queries.question: Did NHS Shetland report a surplus or deficit against its resource budget in 2015/16?
queries.expected_answer: NHS Shetland delivered an under spend against its Core Revenue Resource Limit (RRL) of £396k for 2015/16, indicating a surplus.

queries.question: What was the total operating expenditure for NHS Shetland in 2015/16?
What was the sickness absence rate for NHS Shetland in 2015/16?
What percentage of A&E patients were seen within 4 hours at NHS Shetland in 2015/16?
Who was the Chief Executive of NHS Shetland in 2016?
queries.expected_answer: The Chief Executive of NHS Shetland in 2016 was Ralph Roberts.

queries.question: Who was the Chair of NHS Shetland in 2016?
queries.expected_answer: The Chair of NHS Shetland in 2016 was Ian Kinniburgh.
